Veterans Benefits: Texas has no state individual income tax, offers disabled-veteran property-tax exemptions from $5,000 to $12,000 by disability rating, and provides a full residence-homestead property-tax exemption for qualifying 100% disabled veterans and eligible surviving spouses.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Dallas MEI scorecard and MAP Texas LGBTQ policy tally
Description: Large North Texas metro anchor with a major VA medical center, deep hospital network, arts/culture institutions, airports and pro-sports amenities. Dallas combines no state income tax, broad job access and warm winters with hot humid summers, heavy traffic, high sales/property tax exposure, and elevated violent-crime rates.
